name: Andrew Young
description: American politician, diplomat, activist and pastor
abstract: Andrew Jackson Young Jr. (born March 12, 1932) is an American politician, diplomat, and activist.

concerts.label: New York Council for a Sane Nuclear Policy presents Vote No on Vietnam Rally

about_quotes.speaker: Buckingham
about_quotes.evidence: That was Andrew Young. That’s when he made the statement about you could say that music was more successful than the courts in integrating society.

about_quotes.speaker: Al Hall
about_quotes.evidence: I thought I was going to get contractorship when Andrew Young became ambassador, but they don't believe in parties.
